title: Authentication Core Services
description: User authentication, token issuance, signup flow, and pre-auth pipeline

classes.name: AuthService
methods: _init(): async void — wires db, sessionService, tokenService, eventService
authenticate_from_token(token): async Actor — verifies JWT, resolves Actor type
create_session_(user, meta): async Session — inserts session to DB + cache
create_session_token(user, meta): async {token, session} — calls create_session_(), signs JWT via tokenService
check_session(cur_token, meta): async Actor — verifies JWT, validates session in DB/cache
create_access_token(authorizer, permissions, options): async {token} — writes token to DB, signs JWT
revoke_access_token(tokenOrUuid): async void — deletes token from DB
list_sessions(actor): async Session[] — reads from sessionService + DB
get_user_app_token_from_origin(origin): async string — resolves app from origin, returns user-app JWT

classes.name: TokenService
methods: sign(scope, payload, options): string — JWT sign with secret
verify(scope, token): object — JWT verify + decompress payload
_compress_payload(context, payload): object — key/value compression using short names
classes.notes: Supports payload compression: keys uuid→u, session→s, type→t, user_uid→uu, app_uid→au. Type values: session→s, access-token→t, app-under-user→au

classes.name: SignupService
methods: create_new_user({req, temporary, oidc_only, send_confirmation_code, assume_email_ownership, username, email, password}): async OutcomeObject<CreatedUserOutcome>
internal_flow: for non-temp: validate email via svc_cleanEmail, check duplicate email in DB
INSERT INTO user (username, email, clean_email, password, uuid, ...)

classes.name: PreAuthService
methods: '__on_install.middlewares.early'(_, {app}): async void — installs configurable_auth({ optional: true }) middleware on Express app
classes.notes: Hooks into early middleware installation lifecycle event

classes.name: Actor
methods: create(type, params): async Actor (static) — resolves user/app from UIDs, constructs Actor
adapt(actor?): Actor (static) — normalizes actor from context or legacy user object
get uid(): string — delegates to this.type.uid
get private_uid(): string — HMAC-SHA256 + UUIDv5 derived from uid

key_relationships: AuthService depends_on Actor/ActorType (constructs actors from tokens)
AuthService uses UserActorType, AppUnderUserActorType, AccessTokenActorType, SiteActorType
important_notes: AuthService is the central auth hub: token verify→Actor, session create/check, access token CRUD
TokenService wraps jsonwebtoken with key-compression for compact JWT payloads
Actor.adapt() is a factory that normalizes legacy user objects into typed Actor instances
PreAuthService is minimal: one lifecycle hook that mounts optional auth middleware early
SignupService handles full user creation pipeline including feature flags, email verification, group assignment
Actor.private_uid uses HMAC-SHA256 + UUIDv5 to derive a stable opaque UID (privacy-safe)
AccessTokenActorType does NOT support get_related_actor() — throws by design to prevent ambiguity
